final:
module RefModule(
    input a,
    input b,
    input sel_b1,
    input sel_b2,
    output wire out_assign,
    wire __sel_b1_tmp = (sel_b1&sel_b2);
    assign out_assign = __sel_b1_tmp ? b : a;
    
    always@(*) begin
        if (sel_b1&sel_b2) begin
            out_always = b;
        end
        else begin
            out_always = a;
        end
    end
endmodule
